Sync Options
Sync Pipeline Stages
Push portal stage changes to GHL opportunities
Sync Notes to GHL
Important notes (credit, funding, stage) copied to GHL contact
Sync Tasks to GHL
Tasks with "Sync to GHL" toggle saved as GHL tasks
Load GHL Messages
Show GHL SMS/email history in client workspace
SMS on Overdue Tasks
Send GHL SMS when a task becomes overdue
Email on Overdue Tasks
Send GHL email when a task becomes overdue
Use Backend Proxy (Recommended)
Route API calls through ghl-server.mjs on localhost:3001 — eliminates CORS errors
Test Mode — Simulate Sends
Messages are NOT sent to GHL. Use to test UI without sending real SMS/email.
Required GHL API Scopes
Your Private Integration Token must have these scopes enabled
How to add scopes: GoHighLevel → Settings → Integrations → Private Integrations → Edit your integration → check all scopes below → Save (your token may regenerate — update it above).
Required conversations.readonly
Required conversations/message.readonly
Required conversations/message.write
Required contacts.readonly
Recommended locations.readonly
Recommended users.readonly
After adding scopes, click Test above. If token regenerated, paste the new token into API Key field and Save.

ON

Master switch — disabling stops all scheduled sends

SMS (Twilio)
Get credentials at console.twilio.com → Account Info. You'll need Account SID, Auth Token, and a purchased Twilio phone number.

Cloud Deployment (Railway)
After deploying to Railway, paste your Railway URL here. Admin will automatically push live data to it so emails & texts always reflect current portal data.
Railway Worker URL
Leave blank to use localhost only
—
Local: run node worker.mjs in the portal folder to start both proxy + scheduler.  |  Cloud: deploy to Railway at railway.app — always-on, no PC required.
